rating_computation_note.inclusion_rule: Only non-null assignment_score values are counted
rating_computation_note.service_average_rule: Average of assignment scores for bookings that include the service
rating_computation_note.provider_average_rule: Average of assignment scores for assignments handled by the provider
rating_computation_note.unit_average_rule: Average of assignment scores for all providers in that unit
rating_computation_note.category_average_rule: Average of assignment scores for services in the category
rating_computation_note.fallback_average_rule: If average_rating is missing, fill it with the mean of all available non-null average_rating values (currently 4.73)

skills.description: Installation and repair of pipes, fixtures, fittings
Full home and office deep cleaning services
Furniture assembly, woodwork repair, custom fittings
Air conditioner installation, gas refill, repair

categories.description: Air conditioner and home appliance services

services.description: Complete standard clean for up to 3BHK homes.
Intensive full-home deep clean including kitchen and bathrooms.
Diagnose and repair pipe leaks with 30-day warranty.
Installation of bathroom fixtures, taps, and fittings.
Ceiling and wall fan installation with safety check.
Complete electrical safety audit for the entire home.
Assembly of flat-pack and modular furniture.
Wall-mounted custom shelf design and installation.
Full AC service including filter clean and gas top-up.
Diagnosis and repair of all washing machine models.
Full home termite inspection and treatment.

how_it_works.step_description: The professional reviews room condition, floor type, and high-touch surfaces before starting.
Dusting, sweeping, mopping, and surface wipe-down are done area by area for consistent quality.
A quality check is performed with the customer to confirm completion and spot-fix missed areas.

what_is_covered: Dusting of furniture tops, shelves, and reachable fixtures
Sweeping and mopping of floors in included rooms
Wipe-down of switches, handles, and common touch points
Basic kitchen counter and sink surface cleanup
Bathroom exterior surface wipe and mirror cleaning
what_is_not_covered: Deep stain removal from marble, granite, or wooden floors
Heavy-duty grease removal inside chimney ducts
External window facade cleaning at height

how_it_works.step_description: High-risk zones and stubborn stain areas are identified and treated with suitable agents.
Kitchen, bathroom, and floor lines are deep-cleaned using targeted tools and chemical-safe products.
Final sanitization and dry pass are completed to leave the space ready for use.

what_is_covered: Deep cleaning of bathroom tiles, fittings, and corners
Kitchen degreasing of slabs, backsplash, and sink zone
Detailed floor cleaning including corners and edges
Interior wipe-down of reachable cabinets and wardrobes
what_is_not_covered: Repair of damaged fittings, leaks, or broken tiles
Ceiling mold treatment requiring chemical restoration
Removing permanent paint or acid stains
Cleaning of false-ceiling internals and hidden ducts
Relocation of heavy appliances or furniture

how_it_works.step_description: Pressure and visual checks are used to locate exact leak points in visible plumbing lines.
Affected joints or sections are repaired/replaced and sealed for reliable water flow.
Line is tested for pressure and leakage, followed by a brief usage guideline.

what_is_covered: Leak detection for visible pipes and joints
Replacement of minor connectors and washers
Sealant application at identified leak points
what_is_not_covered: Civil wall breaking for concealed pipelines
Municipal supply issues outside home premises
Replacement of premium fittings unless provided
Damage restoration for already soaked walls/wood

how_it_works.step_description: Threads, pressure needs, and mounting points are verified before installation.
Tap, shower, or fitting is installed with proper sealing and orientation.
Connection points are tested under running water to ensure zero leakage.

what_is_covered: Installation of compatible bathroom taps and fixtures
Basic old fitting removal where feasible

how_it_works.step_description: Existing point stability and electrical readiness are verified before mounting.
The fan is assembled, mounted, and connected using safe wiring practices.
Speed modes, regulator response, and balancing are checked before handover.

what_is_covered: Standard ceiling/wall fan assembly and installation
what_is_not_covered: Fan replacement due to manufacturing defects

how_it_works.step_description: Major circuits, load points, and breaker behavior are documented room-wise.
Earthing, MCB/RCCB response, and visible wiring conditions are tested and flagged.
A summary of findings with severity and suggested next actions is shared.

what_is_covered: Inspection of switchboards and distribution panel
Load balancing and overheat risk checks
Basic insulation and exposed wire checks
what_is_not_covered: Execution of rewiring during audit visit
Wall breaking to trace hidden faults

how_it_works.step_description: All package components and hardware are checked against assembly manual.
Furniture is assembled with alignment checks and safe screw torque.
Final structure is tested for balance and usage safety before completion.

what_is_covered: Assembly of beds, tables, chairs, and wardrobes
what_is_not_covered: Custom carpentry or resizing wooden parts

how_it_works.step_description: Wall dimensions, load capacity, and bracket positions are measured and marked.
Brackets are drilled and mounted, then shelves are installed and aligned.
Installed shelf is checked for levelness and basic load stability.

what_is_covered: Wall-mounted shelf installation at marked location
what_is_not_covered: Complex design carpentry for custom shelves
Rework due to design change after drilling
Repair of weak or hollow wall internals
Painting and touch-up of drill marks

how_it_works.step_description: Cooling, airflow, and coil condition are checked to identify servicing needs.
Filters/coils are cleaned and refrigerant is topped up to recommended level.
Post-service temperature drop and airflow are verified for stable operation.

what_is_not_covered: Complete refrigerant refill for empty systems
Electrical rewiring of dedicated AC circuit

how_it_works.step_description: Error symptoms are inspected across power, drum, inlet, and drain cycles.
Minor repairs and adjustments are performed based on diagnosed component issues.
A test run verifies water flow, spin, and drain behavior before closure.

what_is_covered: Inspection of inlet, drain, and motor behavior
what_is_not_covered: Replacement cost of major parts (drum, motor, PCB)
Plumbing modifications for new machine position
Damage due to voltage surge without stabilizer

how_it_works.step_description: Kitchen, drain, and corner hotspots are identified to map infestation intensity.
Targeted anti-cockroach gel is applied in safe micro-doses at key points.
Customer receives hygiene and maintenance instructions to reduce recurrence.

what_is_covered: Targeted treatment for kitchen and utility hotspots
what_is_not_covered: Full fumigation for severe multi-room infestations
Treatment for termites, bedbugs, or rodents
Long-term annual contract in one-time booking

how_it_works.step_description: Wooden structures and moisture-prone zones are inspected for termite traces.
Approved anti-termite solutions are applied to affected and perimeter areas.
Technician provides follow-up timeline and prevention recommendations.

what_is_covered: Inspection of major wooden furniture and frames
Localized treatment at detected infestation points
what_is_not_covered: Large-scale soil drilling for full-building barriers

service_faqs.question: How long does a standard clean take?
Do you provide cleaning supplies?
service_faqs.answer: Yes, all supplies are included in the price.

service_faqs.question: What if a pipe leak recurs?
service_faqs.answer: We offer a 30-day repair warranty on all pipe work.

service_faqs.question: Do you handle concealed pipes?
service_faqs.answer: Yes, for concealed pipes an extra site visit fee applies.

service_faqs.question: Is there a safety check after wiring?
service_faqs.answer: Yes, a full safety check is performed post-installation.

service_faqs.question: Can you install ceiling fans in concrete ceilings?
service_faqs.answer: Yes, we carry all required anchor hardware.

service_faqs.question: Does AC servicing include gas refill?
service_faqs.answer: The base price includes a gas top-up. Full replacement is extra.

service_faqs.question: How often should I service my AC?
service_faqs.answer: At least once per year for optimal performance.

service_packages.description: Deep home clean combined with pipe leak repair
Wiring audit + furniture assembly + AC service
Custom package created by customer Kavitha Sundaram
